summary: Tested business-info API endpoint and Auto Poster Studio page. All features working correctly - business name 'Super Admin' displays in Auto Poster header, API returns correct structure. Security Dashboard also accessible.

features_tested.details: API returns all required fields: business_name='Super Admin', brand_colors=['#6366F1','#EC4899','#F59E0B'], logo_url=null, tenant_id='superadmin'

features_tested.feature: Auto Poster page header shows business name from logged-in user
features_tested.details: Header displays 'AI-powered marketing posters for Super Admin' with business name in primary color (blue). data-testid='business-name-display' correctly shows the value.

features_tested.feature: Business name fetched from invoice settings, user profile, or stores
features_tested.details: Logic correctly fetches from: 1) businesses collection, 2) invoice_settings company_name, 3) admin user business_name/name, 4) current user business_name/name, 5) stores collection. Currently falls through to user's name 'Super Admin' since no other business data exists.
Page accessible via 'Security Center' nav link. Shows CPU/Memory/Disk metrics, 4 tabs (Overview, Antivirus, Integrity, History), Quick Actions, Fix Statistics.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Business info API tested and working. Auto Poster page at /auto-poster-studio correctly displays business name from API. Security Dashboard accessible via Security Center nav. Business name fallback order: businesses collection -> invoice_settings -> admin user -> current user -> stores collection. Currently shows 'Super Admin' (user's name) since no specific business data exists in DB.
